channel.title: BUbuisnessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from BUbuisnessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Mark Zuckerberg, Adam Mosseri’s words used against them in never-before-seen videos airing in addiction trial
item.description: "I think that there’s over 2 billion people on Instagram, which means there are millions of teens on Instagram."

item.title: Google Gemini was a deadly ‘AI wife’ for this 36-year-old who resisted its call for a ‘mass casualty’ event before his death, lawsuit says
item.description: “Our models generally perform well in these types of challenging conversations ... but unfortunately AI models are not perfect,” Google said.

item.title: Asia faces an energy shock from the Iran war and a closed Strait of Hormuz, as governments halt exports and draw down stockpiles
item.description: Asian countries like China, Korea and Japan have tried to diversify their energy imports, yet they still depend on oil and gas from the Middle East.

item.title: Time on his side: Michael Dell the real business icon as Icahn the activist recedes from view
item.description: In retrospect, the titanic battle between Dell and Icahn likely marked a turning point in activist investing.

item.title: Why women’s earnings plateau in their 30s while men’s just keep growing through their 40s: It’s not just motherhood
item.description: She enters the workforce at a disadvantage. By the time she turns 35, it's something structural and the numbers make it impossible to look away.

item.title: Economic calendar: Jobless-claims and import-prices data on day’s docket
Jobless claims point to declining layoffs. Hiring is another story.
Stocks now point to lower open as Iran concerns push Treasury yields upward
Stocks tumbling as oil surges and Treasury yields push higher — live updates
Why Berkshire Hathaway is resuming stock buybacks under new CEO
